name: Is AI referral different from human referral legally in Houston?
description: No difference; attorneys liable for AI errors in TX.

mainEntity.name: Is AI referral different from human referral legally in Houston?

acceptedAnswer.text: No difference; attorneys liable for AI errors in TX.
acceptedAnswer.description: Same liability standards apply; AI doesn't shield negligence. Texas holds attorneys accountable for tools used. Key factors: (1) Competence in AI; (2) Output verification; (3) No privilege waiver. Courts treat AI as assistant.
